ITEMS.dilution_ratio: 1:64 (1 part disinfectant to 64 parts water) for hospital-grade disinfection.
ITEMS.usage_guidance: CRITICAL for hospital environments. Apply to pre-cleaned hard, non-porous surfaces (floors, tiles, countertops) with a mop or sprayer. Ensure surfaces remain wet for the specified contact time (typically 5-10 minutes, refer to product label for exact time) to achieve full disinfection. No rinsing required unless specified by label or if food contact surfaces are involved.
ITEMS.safety_notes: Wear appropriate PPE (gloves, eye protection, mask if misting). Ensure good ventilation. Avoid direct contact with skin and eyes. Do not mix with other chemicals, especially bleach. Follow label instructions for safe handling and disposal.

ITEMS.usage_guidance: Utilize for daily cleaning of hard floors and various surfaces using a mop or cloth. Its concentrated, eco-friendly, and fragrance-free nature makes it ideal for a retail environment with basic hygiene needs.
ITEMS.safety_notes: Wear appropriate gloves during handling. Avoid direct eye contact. Refer to the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for comprehensive safety information.

ITEMS.usage_guidance: Apply daily for mopping or scrubbing of hard floors, which are the primary surface type in this retail store. Its eco-friendly formulation aligns with product preferences.
ITEMS.safety_notes: Wear gloves to prevent prolonged skin contact. Avoid ingestion. Consult the SDS for detailed safety precautions.

ITEMS.usage_guidance: Spray onto glass display cases, windows, and other reflective surfaces, then wipe clean with a lint-free cloth. Its fragrance-free nature is suitable for customer-facing areas.
ITEMS.safety_notes: Avoid spraying directly into eyes. Keep product out of reach of children. No specific PPE required for general use, but good practice to avoid direct contact.

ITEMS.usage_guidance: Spray lightly into the air as needed to maintain a fresh and pleasant atmosphere for customers and staff, without introducing strong fragrances.
ITEMS.safety_notes: Do not ingest. Avoid direct inhalation of mist. Keep away from open flames or ignition sources.

ITEMS.dilution_ratio: 1:64 (2 oz per gallon) for general disinfection, adjust as per pathogen load.
ITEMS.usage_guidance: Crucial for daily disinfection of all hard, non-porous surfaces including floors, patient rooms, and high-touch areas. Ensure proper dwell time for efficacy.
